name: Sarcastic Family
overview: Emotionless Andromedan mother-daughter Cai Xiaoying and Li Lili, who parted ways on Earth, are forced to reconnect when Li marries human Meng for an interstellar survey. Cai, broke and demanding room and board, joins them, forming a snarky family with Meng’s ditzy dad, navigating hilarity and trials.

trailers.title: 定档预告：《毒舌家庭》定档11月27日 | “嘴”强一家人即将爆笑登场！
